falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a potential trend reversal rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above 14-day average on the NYSE
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive volume would suggest a blowoff top or panic selling, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX index closes above 30 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in volatility would indicate market breakdown or panic, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
